arts.ttl: Peter Crouch insists Marc Guehi 'WILL leave' Crystal Palace amid Newcastle and Liverpool interest - as Joe Cole raves the defender is one of England's best
arts.sum: Peter Crouch (inset) is adamant that Marc Guehi (left) will eventually leave Crystal Palace after the Eagles previously turned down several summer approaches from Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's seven-figure warning to Manchester United as Dan Ashworth nightmare worsens
arts.sum: The Red Devils find themselves under fan pressure after an indifferent run of results under Erik ten Hag. Howe has been on Man United's radar before and while it ended between the head coach and former sporting director Dan Ashworth in frosty manner, he would still be deemed a candidate by some leading figures at Old Trafford. Mitchell said last month: "We want Eddie Howe as our head coach for as long as we can."

arts.ttl: Newcastle United warned key figure could quit after behind the scenes falling out
arts.sum: Newcastle United have been warned Eddie Howe could leave the club following his fractured relationship with sporting director Paul Mitchell. The 46-year-old continues to do a great job on Tyneside with the Magpies sitting seventh in the Premier League table. However, Mitchell’s arrival from Monaco in the summer following Dan Ashworth’s decision to join Manchester […] The post Newcastle United warned key figure could quit after behind the scenes falling out appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche in agreement with Man City's Pep Guardiola on Newcastle United boss
arts.sum: "We ended up doing well in both games for different reasons," said Dyche. But Dyche, just like Manchester City chief Pep Guardiola last month, has expressed his admiration for the job his managerial counterpart Eddie Howe has done at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: What Newcastle United insiders have said about stadium plan that will give fans 'wow factor'
arts.sum: Newcastle Chief Operating Officer Brad Miller said: "We know what a transformed St. James' Park would give us and we now have a significant amount of data and feedback on our stadium footprint and surrounding area, so we are several steps forward. What those close to the process have suggested is that whatever decisions are made that fans will be consulted throughout and both outcomes are classed as a major step forward into the future for Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sent clear £135m midfield message for Newcastle United's Everton challenge
arts.sum: For various reasons, Eddie Howe has yet to pick the same Newcastle United starting XI for two games in a row this season - but that is exactly what he is being urged to do at Everton today. In an ideal world, the Magpies head coach would welcome back Alexander Isak to the squad for the Premier League trip to Goodison Park, but with the Swedish striker still ruled out with a broken toe, he will have to rely on the same group of players who performed so well against Manchester City last weekend.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Everton appear to have found their feet after a shaky start to the season, with Newcastle United their next test in the Premier League this Saturday. Score draws with Leicester City and Southampton came prior - Everton losing the latter on penalties in the Carabao Cup - but the weekend's clash with Newcastle promises to be a sterner test for Sean Dyche's side.
